---
title: "EFA"
author: "Sam Yu"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

library(psych)

hope_items <- dat_clean8 %>%
  select(paste0("hope_", 1:7))

```

```{r}
KMO(hope_items)
cortest.bartlett(hope_items)

fa.parallel(hope_items, fa = "fa")
```

```{r}

efa_3 <- fa(hope_items, nfactors = 3, rotate = "oblimin")

print(efa_3$loadings, cutoff = 0.3)

```
